name: op-worktree
description: Create isolated OP git worktrees for parallel op, ader, and SDK development.

interface.shortDescription: Create isolated worktrees for OP toolchain development
interface.longDescription: Use OP Worktree to create plain or isolated git worktrees for parallel core-dev work on op, ader, and SDKs. Isolated worktrees get their own .op runtime and project-local agent env files.
defaultPrompt: Create an isolated OP worktree for feature/X
